entries.title: Theme admin list showing SaaS.
entries.notes: Capture with only the core Capell stack, Foundation Theme, Layout Builder, and capell-app/theme-saas installed in the isolated demo harness.
entries.useCase: An administrator confirms the SaaS theme is available through the core Themes resource without installing another theme package.

entries.title: Frontend page rendered with SaaS theme.
entries.notes: Capture the seeded Launchdeck page after installing capell-app/theme-saas and building the Foundation Theme/frontend assets.
entries.useCase: A visitor sees a seeded product page rendered through the SaaS navigation, hero, features, proof, content listing, CTA, and footer sections.

entries.title: Theme preview URL output.
entries.notes: Capture a signed preview URL generated with CreateThemePreviewUrlAction for the seeded SaaS theme, site, and page.
entries.useCase: An administrator opens a signed preview URL to inspect a page with the SaaS theme applied before publishing the theme choice.
